mood: Warm, authentic, premium, sensory, rooted in Cameroonian terroir

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-semibold text-[#1F1A17]
scale.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-medium text-[#1F1A17]

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing philosophy. Use p-8, p-12, py-24 for sections to create breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.grid_mode: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid) for marketing/home sections to create asymmetry. Grid items must be direct children.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or small radius (rounded-sm). Absolutely no pill-shaped containers to maintain an editorial and premium restaurant feel.

surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (primary or secondary), 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and soft shadow.
surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass style if sticky: bg-[#FAF8F5]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-black/5. Must not use fully transparent.
surface_strategies.footer: Contrast shift: Dark background (Cacao #1F1A17) with Sand (#FAF8F5) text. Massive padding py-24. High-contrast large brand typography.

buttons.primary: bg-[#A64036] text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-[#8C352D] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1F1A17] text-[#1F1A17] rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-[#1F1A17] hover:text-white transition-colors

components.badges: Small, uppercase, tracking-widest, bg-[#D99C3D] text-[#1F1A17] px-3 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold
components.product_card: Image takes 70% of height, object-cover. Content is left-aligned with optical alignment. Title in Cormorant Garamond, price in Outfit. Action button minimal and elegant.
components.forms: Use Shadcn components but override borders to be 1px solid rgba(31,26,23,0.15) and rounded-none. Focus states must ring with brand primary color.

icons.style: Light stroke (1.5px), earthy tones. Strictly for utility like shopping cart, user, menu, search. Do not over-use decorative icons.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images slightly scale up (scale-105) inside hidden overflow. Links have subtle underline animations. Focus states must be distinct.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling is mandatory for the premium momentum feel. Very subtle parallax on the spices background image.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure all motion conveys meaning or doesn't distract.

specific_page_instructions.home_page: Hero: Split layout or 16:9 large media block using 'hero_traditional_meal' without a heavy blanket overlay. Marquee: Slow, organic 'Editorial Ribbon' with Serif font reading 'Authentique • Camerounais • Gastronomique' in text-[#1F1A17] on bg-[#FAF8F5].
specific_page_instructions.product_catalog: Clean bento grids for terroir products (Farine, Eru, Koki). Use 'product_maize_flour' as structural inspiration. Left-aligned typography. Include 'Add to cart' and bold WhatsApp buttons.
specific_page_instructions.catering_service: Use 'catering_buffet' and 'elegant_catering_unsplash'. Adopt a darker background for this section (Moss #2C4A3B) to provide high-end, dramatic contrast to the rest of the light theme.
specific_page_instructions.cart_checkout: Slide-out cart via Shadcn Sheet. Minimalist design. Emphasize totals, Stripe CTA, and 'Order via WhatsApp' as equal paths.
specific_page_instructions.blog: Heavy editorial focus. Huge headlines in Cormorant Garamond, wide leading for body text, generous left margins.

tech_stack_overrides.ui_library: Shadcn UI required but must remove standard rounded styles and replace with rounded-none or rounded-sm. No default Vercel-like blue focuses.
tech_stack_overrides.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. E.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='whatsapp-contact-link', data-testid='language-switcher'.
